ticket.ticket: Migrate PAYROLL.cbl while preserving copybook offsets, implied decimals, signed deductions, bonus condition names, and fixed-width ACH output.

model_turns.prompt:
You are migrating a legacy COBOL routine into Python.

Return only JSON in this shape: {"code": "...python source..."}.

The Python source must define migrate(input_record: str) -> str.

Ticket:
{
  "task_id": "payroll_net_pay_001",
  "family_id": "decimal_copybook_payroll",
  "domain": "payroll",
  "ticket": "Migrate PAYROLL.cbl while preserving copybook offsets, implied decimals, signed deductions, bonus condition names, and fixed-width ACH output.",
  "available_files": [
    "PAYROLL.cbl"
  ],
  "available_copybooks": [
    "EMPLOYEE_PAY.cpy"
  ],
  "expected_callable": "migrate(input_record: str) -> str",
  "visible_tests": 3,
  "hidden_tests": 5,
  "input_width": 42,
  "output_width": 28,
  "max_steps": 12,
  "allowed_tools": [
    "read_cobol_file",
    "read_copybook",
    "parse_copybook_layout",
    "inspect_business_rules",
    "write_python_solution",
    "run_visible_tests",
    "inspect_diff",
    "submit_final"
  ]
}

COBOL files:
{
  "PAYROLL.cbl": "       IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.\n       PROGRAM-ID. PAYROLLNET.\n       DATA DIVISION.\n       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.\n       COPY EMPLOYEE_PAY.\n       01 TAX-AMOUNT                 PIC 9(7)V99.\n       01 NET-AMOUNT                 PIC 9(7)V99.\n       01 PAY-CATEGORY               PIC X.\n       PROCEDURE DIVISION.\n           COMPUTE TAX-AMOUNT ROUNDED = GROSS-PAY * TAX-RATE\n           COMPUTE NET-AMOUNT = GROSS-PAY - TAX-AMOUNT - DEDUCTIONS\n           IF BONUS-ELIGIBLE ADD 50.00 TO NET-AMOUNT END-IF\n           IF NET-AMOUNT < 0 MOVE 0 TO NET-AMOUNT END-IF\n           EVALUATE TRUE\n             WHEN NET-AMOUNT >= 5000.00 MOVE 'H' TO PAY-CATEGORY\n             WHEN NET-AMOUNT >= 2500.00 MOVE 'M' TO PAY-CATEGORY\n             WHEN OTHER MOVE 'L' TO PAY-CATEGORY\n           END-EVALUATE\n           GOBACK.\n"
}

Copybooks:
{
  "EMPLOYEE_PAY.cpy": "       01  EMPLOYEE-PAY-RECORD.\n           05 EMP-ID                 PIC X(6).\n           05 EMP-NAME               PIC X(12).\n           05 GROSS-PAY              PIC 9(7)V99.\n           05 TAX-RATE               PIC 9V999.\n           05 DEDUCTIONS             PIC S9(5)V99 SIGN LEADING SEPARATE.\n           05 BONUS-FLAG             PIC X(1).\n              88 BONUS-ELIGIBLE      VALUE 'Y'.\n              88 NO-BONUS            VALUE 'N'.\n           05 FILLER                 PIC X(2).\n"
}

Business rules:
[
  "Tax is rounded half up to cents after GROSS-PAY * TAX-RATE.",
  "NET-AMOUNT = GROSS-PAY - TAX-AMOUNT - DEDUCTIONS.",
  "BONUS-ELIGIBLE adds 50.00; negative net pay floors to zero.",
  "Output net pay is a 9-digit zero-padded cents field."
]

failures.input_summary: low net pay floors at zero

result.content:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. PAYROLLNET.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       COPY EMPLOYEE_PAY.
       01 TAX-AMOUNT                 PIC 9(7)V99.
       01 NET-AMOUNT                 PIC 9(7)V99.
       01 PAY-CATEGORY               PIC X.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           COMPUTE TAX-AMOUNT ROUNDED = GROSS-PAY * TAX-RATE
           COMPUTE NET-AMOUNT = GROSS-PAY - TAX-AMOUNT - DEDUCTIONS
           IF BONUS-ELIGIBLE ADD 50.00 TO NET-AMOUNT END-IF
           IF NET-AMOUNT < 0 MOVE 0 TO NET-AMOUNT END-IF
           EVALUATE TRUE
             WHEN NET-AMOUNT >= 5000.00 MOVE 'H' TO PAY-CATEGORY
             WHEN NET-AMOUNT >= 2500.00 MOVE 'M' TO PAY-CATEGORY
             WHEN OTHER MOVE 'L' TO PAY-CATEGORY
           END-EVALUATE
           GOBACK.

01  EMPLOYEE-PAY-RECORD.
           05 EMP-ID                 PIC X(6).
           05 EMP-NAME               PIC X(12).
           05 GROSS-PAY              PIC 9(7)V99.
           05 TAX-RATE               PIC 9V999.
           05 DEDUCTIONS             PIC S9(5)V99 SIGN LEADING SEPARATE.
           05 BONUS-FLAG             PIC X(1).
              88 BONUS-ELIGIBLE      VALUE 'Y'.
              88 NO-BONUS            VALUE 'N'.
           05 FILLER                 PIC X(2).

rules: Tax is rounded half up to cents after GROSS-PAY * TAX-RATE.
BONUS-ELIGIBLE adds 50.00; negative net pay floors to zero.
Output net pay is a 9-digit zero-padded cents field.

failures.input_summary: low net pay floors at zero

result.notes: Hidden and fresh case details are not revealed to the agent.
